'''4th Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Wilderness Fighters]] in the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]].

==History==
At the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], it was part of the [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]], and was commanded by [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Jobin]], who was Mon Mothma's son. They were stationed at [[Echo Station 5-7/Legends|Echo Station 5-7]]. Other soldiers included [[Roj]], [[Jielu]], [[Grond (Rebel)|Grond]], and [[Sora]]. They noticed that the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] was under attack by [[Snowtrooper/Legends|snowtroopers]] and an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]]. They then stormed the cannon and were able to save [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] by disabling an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]]. While most were killed in the battle, at least two soldiers managed to escape to deliver a message to [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].
